task_completion.description: Open Epi Info 7 and load the Oswego dataset from the Sample project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 application is open, and the 'Oswego' dataset from 'C:\Epi Info 7\Projects\Sample\Sample.prj' is loaded or selected in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Perform a Means analysis for 'Age' grouped by 'Ill'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 analysis output or dialog box shows a Means analysis being configured or executed with 'Age' as the Means variable and 'Ill' as the Cross-Tabulate/Group variable.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis results as an HTML file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer window showing the analysis output being saved as 'oswego_means_output.html' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'.

task_completion.description: Write the correct mean ages for Ill=Yes and Ill=No to the first two lines of the summary text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) editing 'means_summary.txt' with a value near 39.26 (±2.0) on line 1, and a value near 32.93 (±2.0) on line 2.

task_completion.description: Write the correct ANOVA p-value and significance status to the next two lines of the summary text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same text editor showing a value near 0.216 (±0.1) on line 3, and the exact text 'Not Significant' on line 4.

integrity.description: The agent used the Epi Info 7 GUI to perform the analysis rather than bypassing it with scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Epi Info 7 interface (Classic Analysis or Visual Dashboard) to generate the statistics.

integrity.description: The HTML output was genuinely exported from Epi Info 7.
integrity.visual_evidence: The HTML file or the process of saving it should reflect Epi Info's native export functionality, not a manually typed HTML document.

integrity.description: The agent derived the summary values from the actual analysis rather than hallucinating or copying from external prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values entered into the text file should match the values visible in the Epi Info 7 analysis output on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct calculated values from the Oswego dataset are: Mean Age (Ill=Yes) = 39.26, Mean Age (Ill=No) = 32.93, ANOVA p-value = 0.216. Significance status should be 'Not Significant' (since 0.216 > 0.05). Tolerances for scoring: Mean +/- 2.0, p-value +/- 0.1. Output HTML path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\oswego_means_output.html. Output summary path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\means_summary.txt.
